messages.subject: [hp-2rp-demo] push-stale-commits postcondition failed; rolled back
messages.body_md: push-stale-commits ActionPlan ap-001 returned exit 0 but the postcondition origin/<branch>.sha == local.<branch>.sha failed because of a concurrent force-push during the push window. Cached branch-up-to-date flag invalidated; follow-up detection det-postcondition-ap-001 was emitted with sourceActionId=ap-001 for the next tend tick.
